/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/pascal_compiler.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pascal_compiler.dir/src/lexer/lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pascal_compiler.dir/src/parser/grammar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pascal_compiler.dir/src/parser/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pascal_compiler.dir/src/semantic/symbol_table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pascal_compiler.dir/src/semantic/semantic_analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pascal_compiler.dir/src/codegen/codegen.cpp.o -o /Users/labmem/code/project4complier_/src/pascal_compiler.exe
